scripts.dev:stack: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:apps
scripts.build: npm run build -w front && npm run build -w back
scripts.db:sync: npm run prisma:generate -w back && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy -w back
scripts.db:sync:seed: npm run db:sync && npm run prisma:seed -w back
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w front && npm run lint -w back
scripts.format: npm run format -w front && npm run format -w back
